refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to operators and system managers.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms to reduce packet loss.
DP2: Use redundant communication channels to ensure packet delivery.
DP3: Real-time network quality monitoring and dynamic adjustment of teleoperation data flow.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP3: Real-time network quality monitoring and dynamic adjustment of teleoperation data flow.

potential_sources: Interaction between network monitoring and teleoperation control data flow.
Dependency on network link quality and telemetry data.
coupling_check.notes: DP3 logically isolates communication quality management, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable network quality metrics.
Risk of delayed adaptation causing temporary packet loss spikes.
Assumes teleoperation data flow can be dynamically adjusted without operator confusion.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating error correction (DP1) if adaptation alone is insufficient.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation control, communication management, and network quality adaptation.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data and network quality metrics.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives telemetry data for monitoring vehicle status and network conditions.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends commands to vehicle based on teleoperation control.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused on teleoperation specifics; higher diffusion risk.
Primarily physical vehicle control; poor containment for communication quality management.
Best containment and ownership for teleoperation communication quality functions.
Focused on safety alerts, not communication quality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP3 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for network management functions.
Interface coordination complexity with Vehicle and Safety Services modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts between Teleoperation and other modules to mitigate overlap.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (real-time network quality monitoring and dynamic adjustment) directly addresses the refined FR and is verifiable.

diffusion_risks: Minor risk of overlapping network management responsibilities with NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows highest containment score and lowest diffusion risk for the selected DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry and network link monitoring within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality management to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface definitions between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution to avoid functional overlap.
Consider fallback mechanisms in Vehicle module for communication failures.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Gate reviews pass with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to operators and system managers.

revise.why: Current level is sufficiently detailed and consistent; no immediate revision needed.

assumptions: Network quality metrics are reliable and timely.
Teleoperation module can dynamically adjust data flow without operator confusion.
open_risks: Potential interface overlap with NGHE Solution module.
Temporary packet loss spikes during adaptation.
evidence_needed: Performance data from network quality monitoring during teleoperation.
Verification of interface contracts between Teleoperation and other modules.
